data.title: GraspOS Studio
data.summary: No-code robot grasping workflows on grasp-anything
data.detail: GraspOS Studio turns grasp-anything foundation models into deployable robot-cell workflows. Integrators drag typed workflow blocks onto a canvas, bind them to ROS2 nodes, and ship sim-validated grasping pipelines without writing orchestration code.

structured.problem: Robot grasping pipelines need weeks of engineering per cell
structured.solution: No-code workflows on top of grasp-anything foundation models
structured.usp: Only tool that ships sim-to-real grasp workflows in a day
structured.impact: Cuts robot-cell integration from weeks to hours
structured.implementation: ROS2 nodes orchestrated by a typed workflow DSL
structured.targetAudience: Robotics integrators and lab automation teams
structured.jury_scope: Won the Embodied AI Challenge jury award
